holdings.infoBox: BASG is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.53%, Amazon.com at 6.73%, Microsoft at 6.54%, Broadcom at 5.01%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.00%.

overview.description: The Brown Advisory Sustainable Growth ETF (BASG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US mid- and large-cap growth companies. Selected securities are believed to not only demonstrate strong fundamentals but also implement sustainability strategies. BASG was launched on Jun 13, 2025 and is issued by Brown Advisory.
